steps.title: Read the boundary line
steps.content:
From the graph, the boundary line has $y$-intercept $6$ and slope $-4$, so its equation is:
$$y=-4x+6$$

steps.title: Use the shaded side
steps.content:
The shaded region is below the boundary line, and the boundary is not included, so the inequality uses $\lt$:
$$y\lt -4x+6$$
The answer is A.
